ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases on the date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on the date */,
  "increase_rate" REAL /* Increase rate of cases compared to the previous day */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of tests that are positive */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of confirmed cases that require hospitalization */,
  "critical_cases" INTEGER /* Number of critical cases on the date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the date */,
  "travel_history" INTEGER /* Indicates if travel history data is available */,
  "source_reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the region data was updated */,
  "governance" TEXT /* Type of governance (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., health department, hospital) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-1) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the data source information was updated */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, public) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the role information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the intervention was implemented */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the intervention */,
  "expected_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the intervention in days */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target population for the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the intervention (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effectiveness entry */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the effectiveness entry */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases on the date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on the date */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the intervention on the date */,
  "hospitalization_rate_change" REAL /* Change in hospitalization rate due to the intervention */,
  "test_positivity_rate_change" REAL /* Change in test positivity rate due to the intervention */,
  "vaccination_rate_change" REAL /* Change in vaccination rate due to the intervention */,
  "source_reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the effectiveness data (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effectiveness_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental factor */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the factor is relevant */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the environmental factor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the environmental factor data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Number of people in the age group and gender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the demographic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
